prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up. Item arrived as described: I am now aware. Initial setup was clunky and I'm not sure what all the pre-installed settings are. The user interface is deeply confusing, and appears to be personalized contrary to my preferences. Battery life is non-existent; requires constant and immediate external charging (coffee). Would not recommend, but appears to be non-refundable at this point. One star.
